title: the intersection of art & technology
content: the intersection of art & technology. tiat is a gallery for artworks using technology, and a place for creative technologists to experiment, exhibit, and expand their practice. ⋆౨ৎ˚⟡˖  the intersection of art & technology. tiat is a gallery for creative technologists. the gallery is closed as we prepare for the next exhibition. if you have an idea, a workshop, or a performance you want to share, we want to help make it happen. email tiat together, we make the intersection of art & technology a place in san francisco <3. sometimes, we host tiat salons where we get a lineup of creative technologists to present and demo a piece of work. selected press and writing about tiat, the intersection of art and technology. zara stone includes tiat as a stop on a san francisco ai tour, highlighting the gallery's interactive exhibitions, workshops, and mozilla-backed artist residency. tiat opportunities support creative technologists and artists in developing innovative projects at the intersection of art and technology.

title: Reviews - San Francisco - A Taste of SF Tours
content: > “We loved our morning tour of San Fran, Muir Woods and Sausalito. Michael was our guide and he was extremely informative about the city. Muir Woods was quite chilly in the morning but we had the perfect amount of time to walk quite a bit and visit the gift shop. It was nice and quiet in the woods. On the way back we stopped at a fort for a unique view of the bridge and had a few minutes to take pictures. > Muir Woods and Sausalito Afternoon Tour Small-Group Half-Day. My husband and I spent the weekend in San Francisco and wanted to explore outside of the city. We chose the Muir Woods & Sausalito + Half-Day Wine Country Tour, and it exceeded our expectations! The beautiful views near the Golden Gate Bridge, walking the trails among the gorgeous trees of Muir Woods, visiting the beautiful city of Sausalito, and the unique wine tasting experiences in Sonoma made for an unforgettable day.

title: San Francisco: Exploratorium Ticket - 700+ Hands-On Exhibits
content: Immerse yourself in a world of curiosity as you touch, tinker, and play with 700+ hands-on exhibits at San Francisco’s iconic Exploratorium with this full-day admission ticket. *   5 5 out of 5 stars  J Julia – United States January 17, 2025 - Verified booking  The exhibits were so fun and dynamic! 5 5 out of 5 stars  V Victor – United States January 6, 2025 - Verified booking  The grandchildren (ages 7 and 9) loved it. 5 5 out of 5 stars  S Stewart – Australia May 28, 2024 - Verified booking  There was only one issue: not enough time. Read more     5 5 out of 5 stars  N Nga – Vietnam January 14, 2024 - Verified booking  Amazing experience, especially for kids. Better to go with companions rather than alone     5 5 out of 5 stars  L Laura – United States November 23, 2023 - Verified booking  This museum is fun for all ages.

title: TIAT PLACE - 151 Powell St, San Francisco, California
content: Creative art in person differs from art on a social media platform. The art in person is more original and doesn't need to copy or mimic others.
